name: Infernity Suppression
name_jp: インフェルニティ・サプレッション
desc: If you have no cards in your hand, you can activate this card the turn it was Set. When your opponent activates a monster effect while you control an "Infernity" monster: Negate the effect, then, you can inflict damage to your opponent equal to the activating monster's Level x 100. You can only activate 1 "Infernity Suppression" per turn.
eff: If you have no cards in your hand, you can activate this card the turn it was Set. When your opponent activates a monster effect while you control an "Infernity" monster: Negate the effect, then, you can inflict damage to your opponent equal to the activating monster's Level x 100. You can only activate 1 "Infernity Suppression" per turn.

mst: Can be activated the turn it was Set
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
